hero.title: Reliable Fuel Supply That Keeps Your Operations Moving
hero.subtitle: Sky Star is your operational partner for fuel supply and transportation for business, corporate, and construction sectors within Saudi Arabia.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.introText: We are pleased to introduce ourselves as a company operating in General contracting & fuel services. Fuel products are extremely flammable materials, the transport and storage of which is tightly regulated.
aboutPage.fleetText: Transport is handled by our own fleet of fuel trucks, giving us stronger control over scheduling, dispatch coordination, and request follow-up. Our fuel transport division coordinates essential fuel product supply to support the continuity of our clients' facilities and projects.
aboutPage.visionText: We seek to take the lead in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the Arab world in the field of the implementation of industrial, commercial and residential buildings and operation, the field of electromechanical works, and in the field of infrastructure contracting, steel construction, and rental of machinery and heavy equipment.
aboutPage.messageText: We look forward to providing customers with the highest levels of service on time and on budget. We seek to achieve this by providing a climate of engagement among employees, managers, and shareholders, and directing attention towards the implementation of projects on time and according to the budget allocated, taking into account quality and safety requirements.
aboutPage.goal1: We strive to be one of the leading companies in the Kingdom by providing high-quality services.
aboutPage.goal2: Customer service and satisfaction is our main goal, whether the customer is a company, institution, or individual.
aboutPage.goal3: Permanent development to provide better services in order to satisfy the customer.
aboutPage.goal4: Working with a professional mindset and responsibility to keep pace with the times.

servicesPage.title: Fuel Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Safe and Highly Efficient Fuel Transportation & Supply
servicesPage.desc: We supply essential fuel products for facilities, projects, and factories with clear operational coordination around the clock.
servicesPage.petrol91Desc: Petrol 91 fuel for vehicles and light operations, supplied in the required quantities with scheduling based on client needs.
servicesPage.petrol95Desc: Premium Petrol 95 fuel designed for high performance and advanced engines, transported and discharged under strict safety guidelines.
servicesPage.dieselDesc: Diesel supply for heavy machinery, generators, trucks, and remote construction/industrial sites.
servicesPage.scheduledDesc: Flexible, periodic supply agreements that guarantee fuel is never interrupted in your facility or operational project site.
servicesPage.onetimeDesc: Fast response to meet urgent needs, delivering fuel tankers directly upon request.

fleetPage.title: Fleet & Operations
fleetPage.subtitle: Modern Tanker Fleet & Flexible Operational Capacities
fleetPage.desc: Our fleet is fully modernized to comply with strict regulations for transporting petroleum materials. We operate continuously 24 hours a day, even during public holidays, to support our clients at any time of the year.
fleetPage.capDesc: We provide tankers in multiple capacities starting from 6,000 liters up to 36,000 liters to cover projects of all sizes and secure fuel supplies flexibly and smoothly.
fleetPage.statusDesc: Owning our fleet gives us greater flexibility in scheduling trucks, setting delivery windows, and following up on requests according to client needs.

contractingPage.title: General Contracting Sector
contractingPage.subtitle: Integrated Construction & Infrastructure Works
contractingPage.desc: In addition to fuel services, Sky Star has deep experience in contracting and construction to support national development.
contractingPage.buildsDesc: Execution and operation of industrial, commercial, and residential buildings under high engineering quality and within the allocated budget.
contractingPage.electroDesc: Installation and operation of electrical and mechanical systems for major factories and facilities under full engineering supervision.
contractingPage.infraDesc: Contracting for water, sewage, and road networks, in addition to the fabrication and installation of major steel structures.
contractingPage.equipmentDesc: Providing and renting a wide range of heavy machinery and equipment to support construction companies and operational sites.
contractingPage.workflowSubtitle: From initial planning and feasibility study to actual delivery and operations
contractingPage.phase1Desc: Thoroughly studying the site and engineering requirements of the project to prepare integrated feasibility studies.
contractingPage.phase2Desc: Developing detailed blueprints and engineering designs reviewed to ensure maximum efficiency and sustainability.
contractingPage.phase3Desc: Initiating construction operations and managing heavy equipment resources under the supervision of expert engineers.
contractingPage.phase4Desc: Conducting final technical inspections, handing over the completed project, and launching support and operations.
contractingPage.safetyRulesSubtitle: We commit across all construction sites to strictly implement safety measures for workforce and machinery safety
contractingPage.rule1Desc: Mandatory safety helmets, high-visibility vests, and safety shoes for everyone present on the construction site.
contractingPage.rule2Desc: Clearly marking safety barriers around excavation zones and crane activity, displaying clear warnings.
contractingPage.rule3Desc: Conducting daily operational checks on cranes and heavy vehicles to ensure complete mechanical safety and readiness.
contractingPage.rule4Desc: Regular training of field personnel on emergency procedures, providing safe assembly points and medical kits.

safetyPage.title: Safety & Quality
safetyPage.subtitle: Safety is an Integral Part of Every Supply Journey
safetyPage.desc: Because fuel is highly flammable and its transport is subject to strict regulations, we prioritize safety and quality above all else.
safetyPage.standardsDesc: Continuous training for drivers and discharge technicians on petroleum hazard management and proper loading/discharging accident prevention.
safetyPage.fleetCheckDesc: Our fuel transport trucks and tankers undergo strict safety checks to verify valves, hoses, and prevent any leaks.
safetyPage.step1: Preparation and inspection before the tanker leaves the source.
safetyPage.step2: Safe transport complying with the specific speed limits for fuel vehicles.
safetyPage.step3: Inspecting the client's site and verifying tanks meet compliance requirements before starting.
safetyPage.step4: Organized and safe discharge under direct supervision and using firefighting equipment.
safetyPage.licensingSubtitle: Clear procedures and operating checks that support safe transport and discharge
safetyPage.requestPrepDesc: Reviewing fuel type, quantity, and site location before preparing the tanker for dispatch.
safetyPage.licenseCivilDefenseDesc: Checking discharge-point readiness and safety procedures before service begins.
safetyPage.licenseTransportDesc: Coordinating tanker movement according to site conditions and the client's operating schedule.
safetyPage.equipmentSpecsSubtitle: Every Sky Star tanker is equipped with advanced protection systems for high-security fuel hauling
safetyPage.spec1Desc: Pneumatic shutoff valves that close automatically upon sensing abnormal pressure shifts or any sudden leak.
safetyPage.spec2Desc: Designed to protect tankers from high thermal fluctuations and maintain stable internal tank pressure.
safetyPage.spec3Desc: Discharging static electrical charges during loading and discharging processes to completely prevent sparking.
safetyPage.spec4Desc: Firefighting equipment and safety hardware that support transport and discharge operations.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: We are here to serve you around the clock
contactPage.successMsg: Your request has been submitted successfully! Our operations team will contact you shortly.
contactPage.errorMsg: Sorry, an error occurred while sending your request. Please try again or call us directly.
